title.zh-CN: 本地 Git 和仓库管理

text.en: Workspace selection and local Git repository scanning.
text.zh-CN: 工作区选择和本地 Git 仓库扫描。

text.en: Repository status, branches, changes, history, and repository detail views.
text.zh-CN: 仓库状态、分支、变更、历史和仓库详情视图。

text.en: Staging, committing, pull, push, checkout, remote-page open, and folder open actions.
text.zh-CN: 暂存、提交、pull、push、checkout、打开远端页面和打开文件夹。

text.en: Pull / push batch preflight and queued execution.
text.zh-CN: pull / push 批量预检和队列执行。

text.en: GitHub device-code authorization and system keychain credential reuse.
text.zh-CN: GitHub 设备码授权和系统钥匙串凭证复用。

text.en: Conflict, failed-sync, and multi-step recovery guidance inside the app.
text.zh-CN: 应用内冲突、同步失败和多步骤恢复指引。

text.en: GitHub repository metadata, stars, forks, topics, releases, default branch state, and repository settings.
text.zh-CN: GitHub 仓库元信息、star、fork、topic、release、默认分支状态和仓库设置。

text.en: Issue browsing, filtering, detail timeline, template-assisted creation, and route-persisted filters.
text.zh-CN: Issue 浏览、筛选、详情时间线、模板辅助创建和路由持久化筛选状态。

text.en: Pull request browsing, filtering, detail timeline, checks, creation, merge, and route-persisted filters.
text.zh-CN: Pull Request 浏览、筛选、详情时间线、checks、创建、合并和路由持久化筛选状态。

text.en: Discussion Markdown timelines inside issue and pull request details.
text.zh-CN: Issue 和 Pull Request 详情中的 Discussion Markdown 时间线。

text.en: Repository milestones grouped from linked issues and pull requests.
text.zh-CN: 基于关联 Issue 和 Pull Request 分组的仓库 Milestones。

text.en: Linked project field metadata in issue and pull request details.
text.zh-CN: Issue 和 Pull Request 详情中的已关联 project 字段元数据。

text.en: Actions run details, job and workflow graphs, logs, artifact preview, failure diagnostics, and rerun.
text.zh-CN: Actions run 详情、job 与 workflow 图、日志、artifact 预览、失败诊断和重跑。

text.en: Project overview timeline for recent issues, pull requests, workflow runs, pushes, and sync events in the current workspace.
text.zh-CN: 当前工作区最近 Issue、Pull Request、workflow run、push 和同步事件的项目总览时间线。

text.en: Release list and status management.
text.zh-CN: Release 列表和状态管理。

text.en: GitHub Discussions browsing, detail view, and topic creation.
text.zh-CN: GitHub Discussions 浏览、详情查看和主题创建。

text.en: Complete pull request code review with changed files, threads, replies, and review submission.
text.zh-CN: 包含 Changed Files、thread、回复和 review 提交的完整 Pull Request Code Review。

text.en: Issue, pull request, and Discussion comment round-trips with recoverable writes.
text.zh-CN: 具备可恢复写入的 Issue、Pull Request 和 Discussion 评论往返。

text.en: Projects V2 browsing and common field updates connected to the work-item model.
text.zh-CN: 与工作项模型联通的 Projects V2 浏览和常用字段更新。

text.en: Actions workflow dispatch, run cancellation, and deployment approval controls.
text.zh-CN: Actions workflow dispatch、运行取消和部署审批控制。

text.en: Signed-in GitHub account connection and profile management.
text.zh-CN: GitHub 账号连接和个人资料管理。

text.en: Account repository scope, list preferences, local workspace preference, and theme persistence.
text.zh-CN: 账号仓库范围、列表偏好、本地工作区偏好和主题持久化。

text.en: Account and organization repository browsing, repository creation, and clone-to-workspace flow.
text.zh-CN: 个人与组织仓库浏览、仓库创建和克隆到工作区流程。

text.en: Watched repositories and repository notification preferences.
text.zh-CN: 关注仓库和仓库通知偏好。

text.en: Local repository favorites and repository groups.
text.zh-CN: 本地仓库收藏和仓库分组。

text.en: Home Attention / Today / Continue decisions with reasons, next actions, project momentum signals, review requests, assigned pull requests, failed workflows, local blockers, and recoverable workspace context.
text.zh-CN: 首页 Attention / Today / Continue 决策视图，提供原因、下一步、项目 Momentum 信号、Review 请求、已分配 Pull Request、失败 Workflow、本地阻塞和可恢复工作区上下文。

text.en: Structured LiliaCode fix-task handoff from full pull request reviews and failed workflows, with source context, acceptance criteria, and result return path.
text.zh-CN: 从完整 Pull Request Review 和失败 Workflow 发起结构化 LiliaCode 修复任务交接，包含来源上下文、验收条件和结果返回路径。

text.en: Multiple named workspaces with multiple roots and workspace-specific preferences.
text.zh-CN: 支持多个根目录和工作区独立偏好的多个命名工作区。

text.en: In-app account activity timeline with type, repository, and owner-scope filters.
text.zh-CN: 支持类型、仓库和所有者范围筛选的应用内账号活动时间线。

text.en: Repository launch candidate discovery and selection.
text.zh-CN: 仓库启动候选发现和选择。

text.en: Saved quick launch configuration per repository.
text.zh-CN: 按仓库保存快速启动配置。

text.en: Launch running-state polling and recent output logs.
text.zh-CN: 启动运行状态轮询和最近输出日志。

text.en: Launch history and failure diagnostics.
text.zh-CN: 启动历史和失败诊断。

text.en: Compact desktop shell with workspace, repository, profile, and settings navigation.
text.zh-CN: 支持工作区、仓库、个人资料和设置导航的紧凑桌面壳。

text.en: Window position, size, and maximized-state restoration.
text.zh-CN: 窗口位置、尺寸和最大化状态恢复。

text.en: Light and dark themes.
text.zh-CN: 浅色和深色主题。

text.en: Context menus and confirmation dialogs for repository actions.
text.zh-CN: 仓库操作的右键菜单和确认弹层。

text.en: Keyboard navigation for repeated GitHub work.
text.zh-CN: 面向重复 GitHub 操作的键盘导航。

text.en: Windows desktop app packaging.
text.zh-CN: Windows 桌面应用打包。

text.en: Contributor verification command for tests, builds, Rust checks, and generated feature-status consistency.
text.zh-CN: 覆盖测试、构建、Rust 检查和 Feature Status 生成一致性的贡献者验证命令。

text.en: GitHub Actions CI, documentation build, and release packaging workflows.
text.zh-CN: GitHub Actions CI、文档构建和 release 打包工作流。

text.en: Signed installer integration.
text.zh-CN: 签名安装包集成。
